zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Dorthea Cardinale於大約1495年出生在英國英格蘭艾可維可時，她的父親Stephen Cardinall33歲，母親Anna Catharina Grith32歲。她於1507年與Christopher Burrough在英國素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可維斯特布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Dorthea Cardinale于大约1495年出生在英国英格兰艾可維可时，她的父亲Stephen Cardinall33岁，母亲Anna Catharina Grith32岁。她于1507年与Christopher Burrough在英国素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在英国英格兰素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可維斯特布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cardinale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Mario, Rocco, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Cosimo, Salvador, Carlo, Cosmo, Francesca, Gasper, Gennaro, Angelina, Demetrio, Gaspar, Gerardo, Julio, Lucrecia, Romero, Rosario.
Italian: from cardinale ‘cardinal’ (see Cardinal ), a nickname for a haughty individual, or a metonymic occupational name for the servant of a cardinal.

variants.name: Cardinal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Adelard, Alberic, Clovis, Colette, Fabienne, Fernand, Francois, Germaine, Gilles.

French and English: from Old French, Middle English cardinal ‘cardinal’, the church dignitary (Latin cardinalis, originally an adjective meaning ‘crucial’). The surname was probably bestowed as a nickname on someone who habitually dressed in red, or who had played the part of a cardinal in a pageant, or who acted in a lordly and patronizing manner.
English: possibly also an altered form of Carbonell . Reaney notes that Cardinal's Farm in Foxearth (Essex) is recorded as Carbonels in 1381 and Cardynals in 1577.

variants.name: Cardinali
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Mario, Angelo, Sergio, Americo, Corinda, Emilio, Ennio, Gildo, Ilio, Luigi, Massimo, Romeo, Serafino, Sisto.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Dorthea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Dorthea Cardinale was born about 1495, in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen Cardinall, was 33 and her mother, Anna Catharina Grith, was 32. She married Christopher Burrough in 1507, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1548, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Dorthea Cardinale est née environ 1495, à Wix, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Cardinall, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anna Catharina Grith, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Burrough en 1507, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1548, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Westbourne, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Dorthea Cardinale um 1495 in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen Cardinall 33 und ihre Mutter Anna Catharina Grith 32. Sie hat 1507 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England Christopher Burrough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 54 Jahren in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Christopher Burrough nel 1507, nel East Bergholt, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anna Dorthea Cardinaleが約1495年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィックスで生まれた時，父Stephen Cardinallは33歳，母Anna Catharina Grithは32歳であった。1507年にイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトでChristopher Burroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスウエストボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Dorthea Cardinale(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Cardinall(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Catharina Grith(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 Christopher Burrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 웨스트보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Dorthea Cardinale nasceu aproximadamente 1495, em Wix, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Cardinall, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catharina Grith, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Burrough em 1507, em East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Dorthea Cardinale родилась около 1495 г. в местности викс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen Cardinall было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Catharina Grith, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Burrough в 1507 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности вестбурн, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
